title: Context Assembly, Trust Labels, Token Budgets, Truncation, and Compaction
description: The agent appends everything, places untrusted text beside system instructions, trims oldest messages blindly, trusts summaries, and cannot detect lost constraints after compaction. Learners cumulatively produce budgeted provenance-aware context builder through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Label each context item by source, authority, tenant, purpose, timestamp, sensitivity, trust, instruction status, and expiry.
Reserve output and tool budget, measure or conservatively estimate input tokens, and admit context by task-specific value and risk.
Preserve active policy, user goal, approvals, tool schemas, recent results, unresolved errors, and evidence while removing redundant or expired material.
